item.title: Avogadro
item.description: Advanced molecular editor designed for cross-platform use in computational chemistry, molecular modeling, bioinformatics, materials science, and related areas

item.title: Stellarium
item.description: Stellarium is a free open source planetarium for your computer.

item.title: QField
item.description: A simplified touch optimized interface for QGIS in the field.

item.title: OONI Probe
item.description: OONI Probe is a free and open source software designed to measure internet censorship and other forms of network interference.
